title: Trimming Shop 15mm Deep Rose Gold Satin Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, 25M Double Sided Polyester Ribbon Roll Balloon Ribbon for Crafting Bouquets, Cake, Wedding Decoration DIY Hair Accessories, Sewing
features: [QUALITY MATERIAL]: Crafted from 100% polyester, this double-sided design offers a consistent sheen and soft texture on both sides, providing a luxurious feel. The satin ribbon features a smooth, silk-like surface that resists wrinkles. With a dense weave, it is well-constructed to prevent fraying or loose strings

[SIZE]: The ribbon measures 15mm in width and comes in a continuous 25-metres spool, offering ample length for various decorating needs. Please note: Due to manual measurement, slight size variations may occur

[VIBRANT COLOURS]: Features vibrant colours that enhance a variety of colour schemes. The combination of vivid hues and a textured finish creates a sophisticated look. Please note that due to lighting effects and varying screen resolutions, the item's colour may differ slightly from the images. Thanks for understanding

[USED FOR]: It is used for making bows, embellishing garments, creating hair accessories, and adding a touch of elegance to various DIY projects. A popular choice for crafting, sewing, and DIY projects. It can be utilized for gift wrapping, and its durability makes it an excellent choice for use in jewelry-making

[DECORATE YOUR PRESENTS]: This well-crafted ribbon not only protects your gifts but also highlights your thoughtfulness and style. The satin ribbons, easily cut to any length, are perfect for adding a personal touch. Ideal for gifting to friends, family, or anyone who enjoys craft projects, these ribbons are sure to bring joy and enhance any present. Our ribbons are suitable for decoration of Christmas parties, wedding, easter, birthday, Halloween, gender reveal parties, baby showers etc.
description: Product Description Our ribbons can add elegant touches to your wedding from the bright and colourful, to the understated and opulent. Stationery and bouquets or chairs and cakes, you can decorate just about anything with these ribbons. These ribbons have a charm which transgresses age and gender, so you can also use these ribbons as a stylish fashion accessory to add some colorful cheer & glamour to your style. Satin ribbons are an incredibly versatile & colourful DIY supply that can be used in numerous ways for decorating, designing and much more. Our wide ribbon roll comes in a variety of colours and adapts the material to fit whatever product you're decorating. Our ribbons are perfect for use in gift wrapping, greeting cards, hangtags and invitations. They can also be used for hair braiding, flower bouquet, jewellery and accessorising. These ribbons can be cut into any length or narrowed in size as per your requirement.
